g.text: Author writes paragraphs + manually defines keywords for each paragraph
Instructor records video speaking the script. Assets uploaded (images, charts, formulas)
STT aligns each script paragraph to its exact start/end time in the video
Agent reads: paragraph text + pre-defined keywords + available assets
Outputs per paragraph: layout mode, assets to show, transition, confidence, reason
Editor sees every paragraph: layout chosen, confidence score, reason, live preview
Override any decision, adjust assets, re-run agent on single paragraph if needed
Approved course is locked. Learner gets a perfectly deterministic, pre-validated experience
Video plays → layout switches per paragraph → script synced → assets appear at right moment
